Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff

Class DiffConstants

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff.DiffConstants
public final class DiffConstants extends Object
Constants used for generating diffs.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    DIFF_DELETE
    Indicates that a character needs to be removed from the actual value.
    static final String
    DIFF_EQUAL
    Indicates that a character is equal in the actual and expected values.
    static final String
    DIFF_INSERT
    Indicates that a character needs to be added to the actual value.
    static final Pattern
    EOL_PATTERN
    A pattern matching the end of a line or stream.
    static final String
    EOS_MARKER
    Character denoting the end of string.
    static final int
    LINE_LENGTH
    A performance hint indicating the expected length of a line.
    static final String
    NEWLINE_MARKER
    Character denoting a newline character.
    static final Pattern
    NEWLINE_PATTERN
    A pattern matching newline characters anywhere in a string.
    static final String
    POSTFIX
    The postfix for all color sequences.
    static final String
    PREFIX
    The prefix for all ANSI sequences.
